parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

data.description: Represents a task within a bid board project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

created_on.description: The date and time when the task was created.

due_date.description: The due date of the task.

assigned_to_user_id.description: The identifier of the user to whom the task is assigned. For getting assigned_to_user_id look "company users" endpoint.

completed_by_user_id.description: The identifier of the user who completed the task.

completed_on.description: The date and time when the task was completed.

schema.description: Represents the data required to update an existing bid board project task.

value.description: The updated description of the task.

due_date.description: The updated due date of the task.

assigned_to_user_id.description: The updated identifier of the user to whom the task is assigned. For getting assigned_to_user_id look "company users" endpoint.

completed.description: Indicates whether the task is completed. This property is only used for updating completion status via patch request.
